label: Strategy Performance
description: Filterable strategy table grouped by asset class with real-time P&L, status, and mode indicators.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.7.note: Empty state shown when allFiltered.length === 0 and not loading.

0.8.note: OverviewData exposes no error field. Global WidgetErrorBoundary covers render errors only. Recorded as known issue.

0.9.note: No commented-out blocks or dead branches.

l0.notes: All checks pass. 0.8 context error gap recorded as known issue.

1.2.note: Scope reading in use-overview-page-data.ts via useGlobalScope().

1.3.note: Org filter changes filteredSortedStrategies via getStrategiesForScope(organizationIds,...) in context producer.

1.4.note: Client filter cascades via clientIds in context.

1.5.note: Strategy filter cascades via strategyIds in context.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays return unfiltered strategy dataset.

1.7.note: Runtime mock data consumed only in context producer behind isMockDataMode() guard. Widget file has no mock imports.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time P&L via realtimePnl map), batch ✓ (uses batch P&L from ctx.strategyPerformance), paper ✓ (no order entry). Widget is read-only.

3.2.note: Context reads wsScope.mode from useGlobalScope(); WebSocket gated on mode==='live' in context producer.

3.3.note: Human check: strategy-table is read-only; Pause/Resume buttons now navigate to strategy detail (fixed 4.1).

3.4.note: Human check: no explicit batch indicator in this widget — relies on scope-summary for mode display.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget is display-only; no order entry to disable. Will render strategy data in paper mode correctly.

3.6.note: No setInterval or WebSocket in strategy-table-widget.tsx. Real-time updates via realtimePnl map from context.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3/3.4 require human browser walkthrough.

4.1.note: Fixed: Pause/Resume buttons were dead (only e.stopPropagation()). Wrapped in Link to /services/trading/strategies/:id so clicking navigates to strategy detail. Sort headers and group toggles have real handlers.

4.2.note: No href='#' found. /services/trading/strategies and /services/trading/strategies/[id] routes confirmed.

4.3.note: Human check: search + asset-class + status filters all fill in correctly.

4.4.note: Human check: filter changes narrow table rows; reset button clears all filters.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.7.note: Human check: group collapse/expand toggles work on row click.

4.8.note: Human check: overflow-x-auto on table; no horizontal leak.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. Pause/Resume dead-button fixed. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all registered strategy types — DeFi basis-trade, staked-basis, yield, arbitrage, market-making, CeFi directional, etc. Table renders any strategy with id/name/assetClass/status/pnl fields from filteredSortedStrategies.

l6.notes: Not started — L6 (tests) deferred to subsequent pass.

7.1.note: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgb[a]?\(|hsl[a]?\(' → zero matches. LATENCY_COLORS uses Tailwind palette classes (not raw hex). text-[var(--pnl-positive)] uses CSS var.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: ~413 lines (after fix) — under 500-line limit. StrategyTableWidget function ~350 lines — borderline; no single sub-function > 200 lines.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function found.

7.7.note: All useMemo deps are stable: strategiesFromCtx (context ref), strategySearch/strategySort/assetClassFilter/statusFilter (primitives), filtered (stable array), showAll (boolean). useEffect deps [grouped, collapsedGroups] are stable. No inline object/array literals in deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano and text-[10px] with text-micro at 6 sites (lines 49, 54, 297, 355, 361, 375). Tokens defined in globals.css @theme inline block (--text-micro 0.625rem, --text-nano 0.5625rem).

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Button, Input, Select, Table, Tooltip, TooltipProvider from shared primitives. LiveFeedWidget wraps layout. No raw div substitutes.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt. TableRow onClick for group toggle is acceptable (group header row is a visual grouping, not a standalone interactive element). Strategy link is a proper + Button. Human: keyboard navigation through grouped table rows.

keepSeparate.rationale: strategy-table owns the per-strategy row view; merging with pnl-chart or kpi-strip would overload the widget. Separate strategy detail page already exists.

relationships.notes: Clicking strategy name navigates to strategy detail. Pause/Resume now navigates to /services/trading/strategies/:id (pending real API action).

dataContract.notes: Strategy rows from REST performance endpoint. Real-time P&L overlay from WebSocket realtimePnl map merged in context producer.

gaps: Pause/Resume action not wired to real API — navigates to detail page as interim
LATENCY_COLORS uses hardcoded Tailwind palette (bg-blue-500/10 etc) — no semantic latency token in globals.css
Asset class filter options derived from data, not from a registry — may miss valid classes with no active strategies
coverage.notes: Covers all strategy types via generic Record<string,unknown> row model. groupBy assetClass is data-driven.

knownIssues: OverviewData interface has no error field — L0.8 relies on WidgetErrorBoundary for render errors.
overview-data-context.tsx imports types from lib/mocks/fixtures — type-only; should migrate to lib/types/ in future pass.
Pause/Resume buttons now navigate to strategy detail; real API wiring (pause/resume endpoint) is a separate task.

findings.description: use-overview-page-data.ts imports runtime values from lib/mocks (CLIENTS, ORGANIZATIONS, etc.) as mock fallbacks behind isMockDataMode()
findings.deferReason: Acceptable data-mode gating; requires broader mock-to-fixture migration outside widget scope

findings.description: strategy-table-widget.tsx:380 — Pause/Resume button had only onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} with no action handler
findings.fix: Wrapped Button in Link to /services/trading/strategies/:id so click navigates to strategy detail; stopPropagation preserved on Link onClick to prevent row group toggle

findings.description: strategy-table-widget.tsx — ~13 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: strategy-table-widget.tsx — text-[9px] at lines 49, 297 and text-[10px] at lines 54, 355, 361, 375 for Badge micro-labels
findings.fix: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano and text-[10px] with text-micro at all 6 sites. Tokens are defined in globals.css @theme inline block (--text-micro 0.625rem/10px, --text-nano 0.5625rem/9px).
